docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $85.00) SERVED JAN-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARVEY, STEPHEN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

ORDER CASE DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT GARVEY, STEPHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
